boards.name: main_logic
questions: What is the target PCB manufacturer (or at least their min trace/space/via rules)?
Any mechanical constraints (enclosure, connectors placement, keepouts)?
Is this a single-pass deliverable or an iterative revision loop?
Are there any presentation/aesthetic requirements (board outline, silkscreen quality, labels, testpoints)?
Do you have an enclosure/3D model and mounting hole requirements?
boards.sow_md:
# SOW — Main Logic

- Lane: `generic`
- Design intent: `professional`
- Generated: `2026-03-01T14:46:28.066570+00:00` (UTC)

## Deliverables
- Schematic: `no`
- PCB layout: `no`
- BOM: `no`
- Pick-and-place: `no`
- Gerbers: `no`
- DFM memo: `no`
- Bring-up notes: `no`

## Open Questions (must answer to avoid guessing)
- What is the target PCB manufacturer (or at least their min trace/space/via rules)?
- Any mechanical constraints (enclosure, connectors placement, keepouts)?
- Is this a single-pass deliverable or an iterative revision loop?
- Are there any presentation/aesthetic requirements (board outline, silkscreen quality, labels, testpoints)?
- Do you have an enclosure/3D model and mounting hole requirements?

## Assumptions
- Work proceeds iteratively: deliver Draft-1 quickly, collect client corrections, then converge to manufacturing package.
- Anything not provided as a requirement is treated as an open question and will be flagged, not silently assumed.

## Risks / Validation Notes

## Exclusions (explicit)
- None listed

## Acceptance Criteria (practical)
- Deliverables package generated and reproducible (BOM/PnP/Gerbers/DFM memo).
- Critical issues enumerated with proposed fixes; client confirms priorities for trade-offs.
- Missing constraints are explicitly documented (no silent assumptions).

Is this a single-pass deliverable or an iterative revision loop?

Any EMI constraints (sensitive radios, conducted emissions target)?
risks: SMPS stability/EMI/thermal may require iteration and/or lab validation; scope accordingly.

system.sow_md:
# System SOW — PocketArcade_FullSim

## Board Scope
- `main_logic` (generic/professional): readiness `manufacturable`, quality `B:84.0`.
- `power_stage` (power/professional): readiness `manufacturable`, quality `B:84.0`.

## System Open Questions
- None

## System Risks
- None

## Acceptance
- Each board has explicit requirements + readiness + unresolved questions.
- Inter-board interfaces are listed with connector and signal assumptions.
- Mechanical enclosure anchors are generated for boards that provide outlines.

engineering.report_md:
# System Engineering Report — PocketArcade_FullSim

- Generated: `2026-03-01T14:46:28.594967+00:00`
- Boards: `2`
- Interconnects: `2`
- Base readiness: `ready`
- Simulation verdict: `sim_ready`

## Placement Optimization
- Total cable (before): `160.0` mm
- Total cable (after): `57.26` mm
- Improvement: `102.74` mm

## Power Simulation
- Paths simulated: `2`
- Issues: `0`
- ngspice: `ok`

## Interconnect Simulation
- Links checked: `2`
- Issues: `0`

## Control/Mechanism Coupling
- Control board: `main_logic`
- Coupling issues: `0`
- Mecha bridge: `True`
- Mecha simulation findings: `2`

## Improvements
- [high] Reposition boards to cut harness length by 102.74mm. -> Apply suggested positions_mm and update cable lengths from recommended_lengths.

gates.detail: System-level power/interconnect/control checks must have no error issues.
Each board netlist/pcb must compile and pass operating-point validation.
Each board should pass ngspice .op cross-check (strict mode requires this).
Mechanism simulation should succeed with no block-level finding (strict mode).

- Design intent: `professional`
- Generated: `2026-03-01T14:46:28.611355+00:00` (UTC)

## Deliverables
- Schematic: `no`
- PCB layout: `no`
- BOM: `no`
- Pick-and-place: `no`
- Gerbers: `no`
- DFM memo: `no`
- Bring-up notes: `no`

## Open Questions (must answer to avoid guessing)
- What is the target PCB manufacturer (or at least their min trace/space/via rules)?
- Any mechanical constraints (enclosure, connectors placement, keepouts)?
- Is this a single-pass deliverable or an iterative revision loop?
- Are there any presentation/aesthetic requirements (board outline, silkscreen quality, labels, testpoints)?
- Do you have an enclosure/3D model and mounting hole requirements?
- Provide max current per rail + transient requirements (startup, inrush, load step).
- Any thermal limits (ambient temp, enclosure, airflow)?
- Any EMI constraints (sensitive radios, conducted emissions target)?

## Assumptions
- Work proceeds iteratively: deliver Draft-1 quickly, collect client corrections, then converge to manufacturing package.
- Anything not provided as a requirement is treated as an open question and will be flagged, not silently assumed.

## Risks / Validation Notes
- SMPS stability/EMI/thermal may require iteration and/or lab validation; scope accordingly.

## Exclusions (explicit)
- None listed

## Acceptance Criteria (practical)
- Deliverables package generated and reproducible (BOM/PnP/Gerbers/DFM memo).
- Critical issues enumerated with proposed fixes; client confirms priorities for trade-offs.
- Missing constraints are explicitly documented (no silent assumptions).
